## Checks

- [ ] Frontend type-check: `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] Frontend lint: `npm run lint`
- [ ] Backend tests: `cd backend && uv run pytest`

- [ ] Droplet deploy notes included if backend/runtime changed
